holdings.infoBox: LCTD is an equity ETF with a total of 368 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.16%, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at 2.34%, Royal Bank of Canada at 2.13%, Novartis AG at 1.58%, and HSBC Holdings at 1.33%.

overview.description: The iShares World ex U.S. Carbon Transition Readiness Aware Active ETF (LCTD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that targets companies in developed markets outside of the US that are considered to be equipped for a low-carbon economy transition. LCTD was launched on Apr 6, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.
